title: The Build → Learn → Teach Flywheel
abstract: The philosophy behind everything Marlon does: you don't just build AI systems — you extract the lessons and then multiply impact by teaching them. This keynote shows how this flywheel drives innovation at the individual, team, and organizational level.
objectives: Understand why building is the fastest path to real AI understanding
Learn how teaching compounds individual lessons into organizational capability
Apply the flywheel to your own team's learning culture
takeaways: The Build → Learn → Teach → Inspire operating model
A template for turning project retrospectives into teachable playbooks
Ways to create 'Aha!' moments that change how teams see AI
